sourceMovie.title: Good Time
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Good Time (2017) stuck because it commits to its crime premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Benny Safdie's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The crime and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Inside Man
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Time clicked for you, Inside Man (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Good Time?
faq.answer: Try Inside Man, Dog Day Afternoon, The Brave One—each shares DNA with Good Time while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Good Time?
faq.answer: Good Time (2017) is best described as Crime, Thriller, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Good Time worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this crime lane.
